title: Larry Long Neck Ostrich Dog Toy With Rope Neck & Legs, Soft Crinkle Textures for Interactive Play, Durable Chew Toy for Small to Medium Dogs, 55cm Size, Variety of Colours, Supervised Use Recommended
features: SOFT & CRINKLE TEXTURED FUN: Designed with plush soft materials combined with crinkle fabric, this dog toy provides a satisfying tactile and auditory experience that stimulates your dog’s play instincts and keeps them entertained for longer periods.

CORD NECK & LEGS FOR CHEWING: Featuring durable rope neck and legs, the Larry Long Neck Ostrich Dog toy offers multiple textures for chewing, helping promote dental health while adding variety to your dog’s playtime. Ideal for dogs who enjoy tugging and chewing different materials.

SIZE & VARIETY TO SUIT YOUR DOG: Measuring 55cm from head to tail with 20cm legs, this medium-sized toy suits most small to medium dogs. It comes in assorted colours, providing an appealing and vibrant addition to your dog’s toy collection, though exact colour may vary from images.

SAFETY & SUPERVISION ADVISED: Made from soft materials, this toy is not indestructible. Always supervise your dog during play and follow trade-off training by offering chews to discourage destructive behaviour. Replace the toy immediately if it shows signs of wear or damage.

ENGAGING AND DURABLE PLAYTIME: Combining plush, rope, and crinkle textures, Larry Long Neck Ostrich Dog Toy encourages interactive and varied play styles. This versatility helps prevent boredom, supports healthy chewing habits, and ensures your dog stays happily engaged for hours.
description: Larry Long Neck Ostritch Dog Toy is a versatile plush dog toy designed to provide interactive and sensory-rich play for your furry friend. Crafted from soft plush material combined with crinkle fabric, it stimulates your dog’s senses with gentle sounds and textures, encouraging curiosity and engagement. The rope neck and legs add an additional texture variety, perfect for chewing and tugging, helping promote dental health and satisfying natural chewing instincts. Measuring 55cm from head to end of body with 20cm legs, this medium-sized toy is suitable for small to medium breeds. Please note the colours may vary from the pictures, offering a surprise element with every purchase. Safety is paramount, and while the toy is designed to be durable, it is not indestructible. Supervision during playtime is essential, and trade-off training is recommended — offering a chew to your dog and removing the toy if it becomes destructive, helping your pet learn healthy play habits. Replace immediately if the toy becomes worn or damaged to avoid ingestion risks. Larry Long Neck is an ideal companion for active dogs that love to chew, tug, and explore new textures, making it a great addition to any dog toy collection. Features: Plush soft material Crinkle sound fabric Rope neck & legs 55cm length size Variety of colours Durable chew toy
